title: Mo' Variants
body:
This mod is a compiled data and resourcepack that adds new variants for entities thanks to the [VariantAPI mod](https://modrinth.com/project/variantapi).


It currently includes all of the variants from Minecraft Earth and a little extra:
- 12 Zombie Variants
- 15 Wolf Variants (Some are breeding exclusive!)
- 5 Spider Variants
- 4 Skeleton Variants
- 6 Sheep Variants
- 5 Rabbit Variants
- 5 Pig Variants
- 1 Enderman Variants
- 9 Cow Variants
- 8 Chicken Variants
- 5 Cat Variants
